basics.name: Kasper Laine
basics.summary: Software developer with practical full-stack web development experience
basics.about: Motivated software developer seeking a junior developer role to contribute to real-world projects and grow as part of a professional team. Experienced in building web applications with modern technologies including React, Node.js, and Express.

work.name: Alfons Digital Oy
work.summary: Developed and maintained WordPress websites using React, PHP, and Tailwind. Built responsive UI components and worked with modern development workflows (Git, NPM). Collaborated on multiple client projects.

work.name: Helsinki Business College Oy
work.summary: Managed the school’s Snapchat account, creating content and promoting events. Increased student engagement and maintained consistent content strategy.

work.name: Helsinki Business College Oy
work.summary: Participated in intensive streaming marathon event. Managed live Twitch streams, moderated chat, and planned streaming content strategy.

work.name: Helsingin kaupunki
work.summary: Provided hands-on IT support including troubleshooting devices, installing computers, and guiding users. Created user-friendly documentation and assisted in digital support sessions.

work.name: Other Experience
work.summary: Worked in fast-paced environments including retail and food service. Gained experience in customer service, teamwork, and responsibility.

education.summary: Bachelor of Engineering (ICT) student at Metropolia University of Applied Sciences, majoring in Software Production. Focused on software engineering, backend systems, and modern application development, with exposure to data-driven and AI-related software concepts. Building practical skills through development projects using modern web technologies and software engineering practices.
